effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your drop has three or more Gem cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: With hair as alluring as precious gems.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, choose a card from your soul, put it into your drop, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of battle. (This effect is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: It's okay to go at your own pace, is what the teacher said.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], search your deck for up to one Gem card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC):When you play an order, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: She knows, the true value of diligent effort.

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](VC/RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "MiMish, Rikashenna", call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: I picked a new score that caught my interest-. Want to listen to it together-?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your unit with the Friend ability is placed in the same column as this unit, if you have three or more other "Friends", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The breeze that gently brushed acorss the face. Listen to the music that flows from it.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a "Friends", this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Roar-! Hey~ you pose too~.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your vanguard sung a Song this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle, and if this unit is in the back row center, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Right after lessons, this is the best!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When you play "Everlasting Sapphire", if your vanguard is "Prismagica, Wilista", draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The eyes filled with affection look towards tomorrow.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Glory is a momentary dream. Even so, its still a dream sought after.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & reveal 2 normal units from your hand, and put them on the bottom of your deck in any order], choose one of your vanguards, search your deck for up to one card with the same card name as that card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Echoing, high in the sky.

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".
[CONT](RC):If you have another "Friends", this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have three or more open (RC), this unit gets [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Taking care of freshmen, is also a part of our duty.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Times like this, they are the best~.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a unit with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: The activities of current students, motivates the rest of the students.

effectEN: [CONT](VC/RC):During your opponent's turn, this unit gets [Power]-2000.
flavorTextEN: The announcement, ended without issues~. Phew…

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: To change myself, I came all the way here….!

effectEN: White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each of your other units with odd grades.
flavorTextEN: Untainted pure white. A lucid sound that cleanses the heart.

effectEN: White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: I said it before, that I can do it even if solo, right?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a unit with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, if you have a vanguard with "Clarissa" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], search your deck for up to one grade 3 or less card with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other unit is placed on (VC) or (RC), if your opponent’s vanguard is grade 3 or greater, [COST] Counter Blast (1), until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Gotta practice more before the next audition!

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".
[CONT](RC):If you have another "Friend", this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: I must be careful to not stand out too much during this chorus.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Astesice" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Thoughts of rivalry? S-such a thing, I don't have any.....

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a unit with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, if you have a vanguard with "Clarissa" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], search your deck for up to one grade 3 or less card with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Girls, if you don't see me for even a day, you should keep your eyes peeled.

effectEN:
Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your soul has no cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if you have a vanguard with the Powerful ability, [Stand] this unit, choose a card from your soul, and put it into your drop. (This effect is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: A singing voice that is clear, and strong. Without limits.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have zero or four or more rear-guards, this unit gets [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Rest time is for resting! It's not good to do things halfheartedly.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a <Ghost> normal unit rear-guard, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, you may put the boosted rear-guard on the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: It is fine even if tomorrow does not come. Since I am happy at this very moment.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], perform all of the following according to the Songs sung this turn.
•"Romantic Happiness" - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•"Twilight Sound of Waves" - Look at the top card of your deck.
•"Madder Red Runway" - You may return this unit to your hand.
•"Six-Flower Fractale" - COST  [Discard a card from your hand], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: What will Loro be singing today~♪

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other <Ghost> is placed on another (RC) in the same column as this unit, choose a card with "Feltyrosa" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Dear sister――Dear sister belongs only to me. Fufu, ufufufu.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you played an order this turn, COST  [[Rest] this unit], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Don't worry about the noise! Let's rev it up!

effectEN: White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[CONT](GC):This unit gets [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Chasing dreams, and fulfilling the duties of an angel.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, you may return this unit to your hand.
flavorTextEN: I can do it! If it is the me of today!

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets "Powerful-[CONT](RC):If your soul has no cards, this unit gets [Power]+2000." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: To ensure that I look perfect, at all times.

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".
[ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose two of your rear-guards, and swap their positions.
flavorTextEN: Haha♪Yay~♪

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other unit in the same column as this unit is placed, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a rear-guard, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of the boosted rear-guards, and return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: I'll handle the cleanup. Please rest early.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: And if you bask in the light, you'll grow bigger!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose up to one grade 2 or greater unit card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Won't you engage in youthful perspiration with us!?

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Don't worry. I'll be with you until you understand this.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Fortia" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "[AUTO](VC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, Counter Charge (1)." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Try this, it helps a lot as it passes through the throat~

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your other "Friends".
flavorTextEN: How's that, take your time lazing around~

effectEN: Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Herminia" in its card name, if your soul has no cards, all of your front row units get [Power]+2000 until end of turn. Then, at the end of that battle, COST  [Put this unit on the bottom of your deck], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and look at the top card of your deck. (Return it to its original spot after confirming it)
flavorTextEN: Can't get rid of the heat no matter how I fan. Nothing but sweat dripping.

effectEN: Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, if your soul has no cards, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Kyouka" in its card name!
Perform all of the following according to the number of your units!
● Two or more grade 1 units - Draw two cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
● Two or more grade 2 units - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
● Two or more grade 3 units - Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: A must-have fashion magazine that covers the latest trends.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Kyouka" in its card name, choose a grade from 1 to 3, declare it, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one unit card with the declared grade or Magazine card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Doesn't a day with great makeup make you feel like everything's going to be fine?

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Kyouka" in its card name, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose a grade 2 or greater unit card with different card name from your vanguard from your drop, and put it on the top of your deck.
flavorTextEN: What~ Flavor~...... Is my tongue looking for~?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your rear-guard is put on the bottom of your deck during your battle phase, if you have a vanguard with "Haseritt" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Harselitte" in its card name, choose up to one grade 2 or less normal unit from your hand, call it to (RC), until end of turn, it gets [Power]+2000, and "[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, draw a card, and put this unit on the bottom of your deck.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Haseritt" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of battle. Then, at the end of that battle, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose your back row middle rear-guard, and move it to an open front row (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Haseritt" in its card name, choose up to one grade 2 or less normal unit from your hand, call it to (RC), until end of turn, it gets [Power]+2000, and "[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, draw a card, and put this unit on the bottom of your deck.".
flavorTextEN: Fufu, are these all the things needed for the lesson?

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000 for every two of your units. (Includes this unit)
flavorTextEN: That floaty feeling......! It can be used in the dance!

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have four or more units, COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose a normal order from your drop, and it gets "[CONT]:This card can be played from the drop, and when it would be put into your drop after being played, put it on the bottom of your deck instead." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Looks like they're ready. I think it's my turn next.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your damage zone has a face up order card, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & put a unit card from your hand into your damage zone face up], choose a face up order card from your damage zone, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: I still have something to do.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your drop has a Magazine card, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Lilfa" in its card name, choose up to one grade 2 or greater card from your hand, call it to your back row center (RC), and it gets "Boost" until end of turn. If you called a card, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: With a big body, it takes that much longer to get dressed too.

effectEN: [AUTO](Drop):When your rear-guard is placed by the ability of your grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Sheltered Girl of the Pharmacy, Mediell
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Mediell" in its card name, choose up to one grade 2 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC). If you called a card, reveal the top card of your deck, and if it is a trigger unit, [Rest] the unit called by this effect.
flavorTextEN: Is it the medicine? If you're okay with me being an apprentice......

effectEN:
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your grade 3 or greater vanguards with "Mediell" in its card name, and until end of turn, it gets [Power]+5000, and the cost of that unit's original [ACT] ability becomes "Counter Blast (1)".
[AUTO](RC):When your other unit is placed on (RC) from drop, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I've got to replenish the common medicines someday.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from a grade 0 with "Michu" in its card name, search your deck for up to one "All Set Up!", put it into your Order Zone, and shuffle your deck.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: This and that...... Ah, and those too!

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[ACT](Order Zone):If you have a vanguard with "Michu" in its card name, COST  [[Rest] this card], Soul Charge (1), choose up to one Cannonball card from your hand, and put it into your Order Zone.

[AUTO](Drop):When a card is put into your Order Zone, if you do not have a unit with "Nokuno" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)] to call this card to your back row (RC). (If there are two copies of this card in drop, you can only call one)
[Glitter]-"Michu" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Michu" in its card name)
[AUTO](Back row center RC): At the end of the battle your vanguard attacked, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card] to [Stand] this unit, and this unit exchanges positions with your vanguard. At the end of the turn, exchange the swapped units' positions. (Your soul does not change)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, if "All Set Up!" is in your Order Zone, look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one [Glitter] or Set Order from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you revealed a card, put this unit at the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Hmm, that's a nice expression. Let me take a picture.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, COST  [retire this unit], search your deck for up to one order card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your drop has a Magazine card, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Luticia" in its card name!
Put this card into your soul, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+15000 until end of that battle. If your soul has four or more Cursed Play cards, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: As these confetti are amulets made by me, they come with some anti-demon powers, however little.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Luticia" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a Cursed Play card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Whew~ Let's go to Lu's place today too~

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Luticia" in its card name!
Put this card into your soul, and Soul Charge (1).
Choose up to one card from your soul with grade less than or equal to your vanguard, call it to (RC), and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: If it's this brilliant, everyone can have a good time even if my dance isn't that good......!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your back row has two or more grade 2 or greater rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I'll resume my diet tomorrow~♪ Shall we have some ice-cream?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your back row has a grade 2 or greater rear-guard, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of battle.
flavorTextEN: Ahahah♪ It's ticklish~♪

nameEN: In Search of a Big One! Blair
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your soul has two or more Cursed Play cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Trap set perfectly! Today's the day I'll catch a big one!

nameEN: Staying In Even On Days Off, Luticia
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Luticia" in its card name, COST  [put a card from hand on the bottom of deck], search your deck for up to one Cursed Play card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: It's not like I can't move due to muscle aches, okay? It's true, okay?

nameEN: Not Good with the Heat, York
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from your hand, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five card of your deck, choose up to one "Lyrical ShootingStarS" from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your drop has a Magazine card, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I've collected lots of today's lucky item~♪

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your rear-guard was put on the bottom of your deck this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Let's go home together. I want to hear more about your day.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and if your soul has one or more cards, this unit cannot attack or boost.
flavorTextEN: Beauty is to reduce the unnecessary and improve further.

nameEN: Leaning Back against the Wisteria, Vepr
effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul and put a Blitz Order from your hand into your soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of the turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name, COST  [put this unit into your soul], look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck. If you put a card on the bottom of your deck, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Michu" in its card name!
Perform one of the following.
•Search your deck for up to one unit card with "Noqno" in its card name, discard it, and shuffle your deck.
•If you have a back row center rear-guard with "Noqno" in its card name, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: I've got to step forward.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Haseritt" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your back row center rear-guards, and move it to an open front row (RC).
flavorTextEN: The transparent future may possibly embrace any color.

effectEN: Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, if your soul has no cards, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Irresistably attractive glossy fur.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your rear-guard is put on the bottom of your deck during your battle phase, if you have a vanguard with "Haseritt" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Eat up, and work hard during the afternoon lectures.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[ACT](Order Zone):If you have a vanguard with "Michu" in its card name, COST  [[Rest] this card], Soul Charge (1), choose up to one Cannonball card from your hand, and put it into your Order Zone.
flavorTextEN: Which. One. Shall. It. Be.

effectEN: Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Herminia" in its card name, if your soul has no cards, all of your front row units get [Power]+2000 until end of turn. At the end of that battle, COST  [Put this unit on the bottom of your deck], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The bus that Miss Herm is on is coming.....!

effectEN: [AUTO](Drop):When your rear-guard is placed by the ability of your grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: She'll always be found where the bustle is.

nameEN: Resting Her Back on Wisteria Trellis, Vepur
effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul and put a Blitz Order from your hand into soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of the turn.
flavorTextEN: Let's take shelter from the rain for just a bit.....

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your damage zone has a face up order card, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & put a unit card from hand into your damage zone face up], choose a face up order card from your damage zone, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: There are still things I've not done.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name, COST  [put this unit into soul], look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck. If you put a card on the bottom of your deck, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Haa, this is comfortable~ I wonder if I'll ever be back for lectures.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one "Lyrical ShootingStarS" from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Hah~ Let's look for solutions before we faint to this heat~

effectEN:
[AUTO](Drop):When a card is put into your Order Zone, if you do not have a unit with "Noqno" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)] to call this card to your back row center (RC). (You can only call one of this card if there are two in your drop)
[Glitter]-"Michu" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Michu" in its card name)
[AUTO](Back row Center RC):At the end of the battle your vanguard attacked, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], [Stand] this unit, and swap the position of your vanguard with this unit. At the end of that turn, swap the position of that swapped unit with this unit. (The soul does not move)
flavorTextEN: Would you.....Like to listen to my song?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, COST  [retire this unit], search your deck for up to one order card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The world reflected in your eyes looks like it's shimmering bright.

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Happy Shopping! Michu".
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from a grade 0 with "Michu" in its card name, search your deck for up to one "All Set Up!", put it into your Order Zone, and shuffle your deck.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: It's your shooting star, your diamond in the rough! Idol VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei!

nameEN: To Her Dream Stage, Hoshimachi Suisei
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Shy Vocal, Noqno".
[AUTO](Drop):When a card is put into your Order Zone, if you do not have a unit with "Noqno" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call this card to your back row center (RC). (You can only call one of this card if there are two in your drop)
[Glitter]-"Michu" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Michu" in its card name)
[AUTO](Back Row Center RC):At the end of the battle your vanguard attacked, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], [Stand] this unit, and swap the position of your vanguard with this unit. At the end of that turn, swap the position of that swapped unit with this unit. (The soul does not move)
flavorTextEN: To the most spectacular stage I've ever dreamed of!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have three or more rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/157): Always pushing the boundaries. A personality like that is needed sometimes.
(D-PR/256): If there's Call and Response! Anywhere can be a stage♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a Song card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: What would you like to sing? I'll play it for you♪

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: My time with my dear sister cannot be interrupted even by deities.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose up to one grade 2 or greater unit card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Won't you engage in youthful perspiration with us!?

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Don't worry. I'll be with you until you understand this.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your other "Friends".
flavorTextEN: How's that, take your time lazing around~

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Haseritt" in its card name, choose up to one grade 2 or less normal unit from your hand, call it to (RC), until end of turn, it gets [Power]+2000, and "[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, draw a card, and put this unit on the bottom of your deck.".
flavorTextEN: Fufu, are these all the things needed for the lesson?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Lilfa" in its card name, choose up to one grade 2 or greater card from your hand, call it to your back row center (RC), and it gets "Boost" until end of turn. If you called a card, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: With a big body, it takes that much longer to get dressed too.
